title: India ‘cockroach’ activist Sonam Wangchuk ends hunger strike as protests spread
summary_full: Sonam Wangchuk halted strike amid concerns about ‘possible violence’ in India as protest movement urges demonstrations across country on Friday over police brutalityThe Indian “cockroach” activist Sonam Wangchuk has ended a 26-day hunger strike over an exam paper scandal that has spiralled into a wide ranging, youth-led wave of demonstrations against Narendra Modi’s government.Supporters meanwhile have called a nationwide day of protest on Friday. Continue reading...
